title: Duralap
subtitle: Offline-First Performance Tracking
description: Provides athletes and sports enthusiasts with a premium, offline-first performance tracker that works without lag. It features millisecond-precise timing and local database caching for seamless metric analysis.
features: Offline local caching with Room DB
Jetpack Compose UI with adaptive layouts

title: Meal Management System
subtitle: University Hall Dining Platform
description: Solves the problem of inefficient food resource allocation and manual expense tracking in university dining halls. It automates daily meal bookings, tracks expenses, and generates real-time analytical reports.
features: Three-tier role system: Student, Manager, Provost
Expense analytics and monthly bill generation

title: Bazar — Market Monitor
subtitle: Commodity Price Tracking & Analytics
description: Aggregates commodity prices from multiple retail markets to protect consumers from artificial inflation. It detects inflation trends and allows crowd-sourced price reporting with admin verification.
features: Inflation trend analysis with visual charts
Crowd-sourced price submissions with admin verification

title: Personal Portfolio Web Platform
subtitle: Interactive 3D React Showcase
description: This very site — a premium, high-performance interactive 3D portfolio built with React, React Three Fiber, and Tailwind CSS, featuring a live particle constellation, animated 3D geometry, and Vercel serverless API.
features: Animated wireframe torus knot with mouse parallax
Glassmorphism UI with gold & emerald color scheme
